programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest combs the Florida Everglades for a predator rumored to exist for years, the Black Panther; it might be a case of mistaken identity, but while scouring the landscape, discoveries suggest that it might be more than a rumor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes; recently discovered remains disprove that they went extinct 1,000 years ago; Forrest tries to prove the giant species still lives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest teams up with a specialist in Newfoundland in search of a predator that was declared extinct in 1930; the duo meets with a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf and uncovers evidence that suggests the species could be alive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the great auk; his passionate search for a large flightless seabird takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever seen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest tracks clues and eyewitness accounts suggesting that the Formosan clouded leopard is still alive after being declared extinct; he treks deep into the jungles of Taiwan where a run-in with a predator might just solve a mystery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, trail engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by grizzly bear protecting her cubs; during a vacation in the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson is snorkeling when she finds herself face-to-face with a tiger shark.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip; hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life; a couple is attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Nicole Moore's vacation in Cancun, Mexico, gets cut short when a shark attacks her close to shore; in Tennessee, a timber rattlesnake bites firefighter Kyle Watson while he hikes in the woods with his family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Allena Hansen works on her ranch in the California desert with her two rescue dogs when a black bear attacks; in Cancun, Mexico, Jonathan Schoeneman goes spearfishing with his best friend when he comes face to face with a crocodile.

programme.title: Too Cute!
programme.desc: The fun-filled early months in the lives of Savannah, Siberian and shorthair cats include exploring new realms and playing with other small household pets.

programme.title: Too Cute!
programme.desc: Frisky fun with glamorous American Curl kittens; Tonkinese youngsters bedevil their mother; a Maine Coon kitten bosses his siblings around.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Bindi and the zoo welcome two baby echidnas; health concerns become a major threat for one puggle's survival; a jabiru goes missing.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The boys deal with more nuisance alligators; Tre embarks on a mission to locate a legendary creature that supposedly haunts the bayous of Mississippi.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Problems with nuisance alligators keep the boys busy; a boy encounters a danger in his pool; Ashley's PR scheme involves Scott dressing in a gator costume.

programme.desc: Jackson comes to the aid of three Boston families; Bengal threatens couple's first holiday; fighting cats may cancel party; sphinx pees all over gifts.

programme.desc: A couple is desperately seeking the help of Jackson for their feuding cats, Bitten and Chompy; a couple who recently moved in together are having second thoughts because of the vicious behavior of the cat, Achilles.

programme.desc: Ready to take on more responsibility, Sui leads her first rescue; adopter with many chickens looks for a suitable dog; Tia rescues a pit bull with scars revealing a painful past.

programme.desc: Adventurous Californian couple want to find a new dog to replace their recently passed one; Matt must hurry to save puppies trapped under railroad ties; sad news comes to Villalobos.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete builds a secluded, three-story, speakeasy-themed treehouse, 60 feet above the ground with rooftop lounge and writing-and-recording room with vintage guitars for country music superstar Brian Kelley, of the award-winning duo Florida Georgia Line.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete returns to where he built his very first treehouse; now with experience, knowledge, new techniques and some steel, he can rebuild it; he has the technology; he has the capability to build the world's first bionic treehouse.

programme.desc: Pete helps three siblings surprise their parents with a Scandinavian-style, two story, art studio treehouse with Murphy-bed art tables, multi-use studio area and sky tents in Wisconsin.

programme.desc: Pete is tasked with building a tree-top, Native American themed, summer camp treehouse with a built-in kennel, French door, climbing wall, back deck and fire pole for a young family on the Washington coast.

programme.desc: Pete and the crew look to Buddha's teachings as they build a traditional Japanese teahouse 20 feet in the air complete with a shoji screen wall, Tatami mats, low table with sunken floor and pagoda style roof for a zen-like paradise in Seattle.
